test_path: Registered an Iceberg Spark catalog (Hadoop type) backed by an OCI bucket, created a partitioned-by-dept table, inserted 4 rows, queried snapshots, listed physical Parquet files. End-to-end ACID round-trip on `oci://`. Iceberg Spark JAR (`org.apache.iceberg.spark.SparkCatalog`) is pre-installed on the tpcds cluster — no extra setup.
